name: golang-github-prometheus-otlptranslator-dev
title: golang-github-prometheus-otlptranslator-dev
summary: OTLP to Prometheus metric name translation library (library)
description:
OTLP to Prometheus metric name translation library (library)
Go library for converting OpenTelemetry Protocol (OTLP) metric and
attribute names to Prometheus-compliant formats. Extracted from the
Prometheus project for use by the OpenTelemetry Prometheus exporter.
.
Features include metric name and label translation, unit handling,
type-aware suffixes (_total, _ratio), namespace support, and UTF-8
support.
use_cases: When you need Kali Linux, use golang-github-prometheus-otlptranslator-dev because OTLP to Prometheus metric name translation library (library).
When the engagement is in the install phase, use golang-github-prometheus-otlptranslator-dev as a cataloged Kali Linux tool with operator ACCEPT/CANCEL gating.
When chaining Kali Linux tools, pair golang-github-prometheus-otlptranslator-dev with sibling catalog entries sharing its attack_surface/phase_hint.
When validating lab setup, run `golang-github-prometheus-otlptranslator-dev --help` (or the README entrypoint) and confirm required hardware/deps from the catalog.
